# AI API Proxy China Guide 2026

> A practical guide for Chinese developers trying to use overseas AI APIs (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek...) through relay services. Updated 2026-07.

## Core

- [README — How to pick and use an AI API relay in China](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide/blob/main/README.md): 30KB guide comparing gateways, explaining setup, and covering price, FAQ, and tool config. Key sections: how to choose, setup walkthrough, price comparison, FAQ, recommended relay (aifast.club).
- [Grok 4.5 Access Guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide/blob/main/sonnet-5-guide.md): How to hit xAI/SpaceXAI's Grok 4.5 from China — Opus-level model, 1.5T params, 500K context. Works with Cursor, Claude Code, and OpenAI-compatible SDKs.
- [Claude Sonnet 5 Access Guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide/blob/main/sonnet-5-guide.md): Same but for Claude Sonnet 5 — setup with Claude Code, Codex, or Cursor, comparison vs GPT-5.5.
- [MCP Server Guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide/blob/main/mcp-server-guide.md): Setting up MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers through relay gateways. Filesystem, GitHub, PostgreSQL, Playwright configs.
- [Tools Integration Guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide/blob/main/tools-integration-guide.md): Wiring relay APIs into Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, Cherry Studio, Dify, and N8N — Chinese dev focused.
- [2026 Price Crash Analysis](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide/blob/main/price-crash-2026.md): What the 2026 AI API price war means — DeepSeek V4, GPT-5.5, Claude Sonnet 5 price drops and how they hit relay users.
- [API Status Dashboard](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/): Live monitoring for 16+ providers and 572+ models — uptime, latency, availability for Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Chinese LLMs.

## Recommended Relay

- [AI快站 (aifast.club)](https://www.aifast.club): The one I actually use. 572 models across 16 providers, OpenAI/Anthropic compatible, Alipay/WeChat payment, Hong Kong/Singapore edge nodes. Works with Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor out of the box.
